entries.text:
Verse 11

Israel

The sin of Achan and its results teach the great truth of the oneness of the people of God, Joshua 7:11. "Israel hath sinned." See in illustration; 1 Corinthians 5:1-7; 1 Corinthians 12:12-14; 1 Corinthians 12:26. The whole cause of Christ is injured by the sin, neglect, or unspirituality of one believer.
